goal_text: Task 07311: You want to find a moderately priced restaurant and it should be in the north part of town. Don't go for the first venue the system offers you, ask if there is anything else. Make sure you get the phone number and postcode.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
